历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science Category from 2021-2023) were approximately 5301, 5551, 5254, 6060, and 5684 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend; the baseline for 2025 is about 5684, an increase of about 376 compared to 2024, but still higher than the levels of 2021-2023; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi Province: 149 in 2021, 153 in 2022, 151 in 2023, 153 in 2024, 157 in 2025, with a slight annual increase; the 2026 plan is 160, an increase of 3 compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 1.9%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 34th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 33-34 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (laboratory explosion incident), which may slightly suppress application psychology; ranked 23rd in Douyin comprehensive popularity (relatively hot), with high attention on short video platforms; in 2023, there was discussion due to Zhang Xuefeng's advice against journalism majors, but the overall impact was limited; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; fifth round of discipline evaluation: Civil Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Landscape Architecture A-; Electrical Engineering (A-) corresponds to Electrical Engineering and Automation, Mechanical Engineering (A-) corresponds to High-end Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing, etc., all being advantageous engineering directions of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science are highly recommended majors for 2024-2026, highly consistent with the university's Engineering Experimental Classes (Future Information, Computer and Intelligent Software, Electrical Engineering, etc.), boosting the popularity of related majors; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province General College Entrance Examination is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (about 472,500), with an estimated 267,900 in the Physics Category, leading to a slight increase in competition; Chongqing University is located in Chongqing (Southwest China), while Jiangxi Province is in the central region, with some cross-provincial regional preference differences; the university's enrollment plan in Jiangxi Province accounts for a small proportion (about 160 out of the national total), with no special preference for local students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5684, a slight expansion in the 2026 plan (+1.9%), a slight increase in the total number of local candidates, the boost in competition from popular majors like Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering, and the slight suppression from the negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is: range 5264-6264, with a fluctuation half-width of 500, covering historical fluctuation ranges and reasonable uncertainty corresponding to the university's level.

For rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (within about 5500), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Excellence Program, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Future Information; for rankings in the middle part of the range (about 5500-6000), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 2 majors like High-end Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing, and Mathematics and Physics Foundation, while also trying for lower-score Tier 1 majors; for rankings in the lower part of the range (outside about 6000), it is recommended to secure Tier 3 majors as a safety, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors. Popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science are highly competitive, so personal interests and employment prospects should be comprehensively considered.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 953, 924, 914, 913, and 966 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings gradually moved forward (increased competition), but in 2025 they fell back to 966. The overall fluctuation range is approximately 913–966, with highly concentrated rankings. The 2025 baseline is about 966. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Jiangxi Province: 10 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 8 in 2024, 8 in 2025, showing a shrinking trend in recent years. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 14, an increase of 6 compared to 2025, an expansion rate of 75%, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 34th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 33–34 range in recent years, with strong comprehensive strength. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (laboratory explosion incident), which may mildly suppress application psychology. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively hot), with overall high attention. In 2023, there was discussion due to Zhang Xuefeng's event advising against journalism majors, but the university's liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include law and journalism. The social popularity of journalism and communication majors is clearly discouraging, which may affect willingness to apply for related majors. Fifth round of discipline evaluation: Civil Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Landscape Architecture A-. Liberal arts enrollment majors (law, journalism, Chinese language and literature, foreign languages) have no corresponding A-class disciplines, but the university's overall platform advantages are prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is in a state of divided observation (slightly hot), journalism and communication are clearly discouraged, foreign languages are generally observed. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Jiangxi Province is approximately 474,900, slightly increased from 2025. The history category is estimated to be about 207,000 people, with slightly intensified competition. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing (southwest region), while Jiangxi Province is a central province, with certain cross-provincial regional preference differences. The university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Jiangxi accounts for a relatively small proportion (about 14 people nationwide), with no special local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 966, the core favorable factor of a significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (from 8 to 14), and secondary factors such as a slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province, divided popularity of law, and clear discouragement of journalism and communication, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 will significantly move backward (easier to enter). The range is 1208–1634, with a half-width fluctuation of 213, reflecting the greater uncertainty brought by the expansion.

- Humanities Experimental Class (Law and Journalism) (Law, Journalism)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Boya Class, including Chinese, History, Philosophy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 1421, range 1208–1634. Candidates in the upper part of the range (about 1200–1400) can aim for Tier 1 Humanities Experimental Class (Law and Journalism); those in the middle part (about 1400–1500) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors such as English and German; those in the lower part (beyond about 1500) can consider Tier 3 majors like Japanese as a safety option. The significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (8→14) greatly increases admission opportunities, but factors such as divided popularity of law and clear discouragement of journalism and communication need to be weighed against personal career plans.
